/usr/bin/cc -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/renderer.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/renderer.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/renderer.dir/src/platform/X11/window.c.o CMakeFiles/renderer.dir/src/Scene.c.o CMakeFiles/renderer.dir/src/app/image.c.o -o renderer  /usr/lib/libSM.so /usr/lib/libICE.so /usr/lib/libX11.so /usr/lib/libXext.so
